hypothesis: If crystal structures are perturbed by moderate lattice strain or coordinate noise, then gradient-descent optimization of differentiable XRD-similarity losses (negative cosine similarity, MSE, negative entropy similarity), even when enforcing correct symmetry, will fail to reliably recover ground-truth structures (low Match Rate) because the XRD loss landscape is highly nonconvex with many local minima, whereas energy-based relaxation using CHGNet will more frequently recover the correct structures.
